findings.detail: Reads cleanly as a 2x2 confusion matrix. Column band 'PREDICTED (what the model said)' spans both prediction columns; left band 'ACTUAL (the truth)' labels the two rows. TP top-left, FN top-right, FP bottom-left, TN bottom-right — matches corpus section 5 exactly. Diagonal TP/TN green (correct), off-diagonal FP/FN red (errors); headers blue. Each cell pairs the acronym with plain words (correct catch / miss / false alarm / correct pass). No scope-creep nodes (no accuracy/precision/recall/F1/ROC/calibration). All text fits, no overlap or truncation.

Non-blocking. mermaid pads the single-table node's canvas with vertical whitespace above the grid. The matrix itself is centered and fully legible at viewer scale; cosmetic only, does not affect readability.

stats.layout: flowchart TB — single HTML <table> grid node (legacy bgcolor/border/font attrs survive sanitization; CSS style attrs do not)
